'''Hrasskis''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] race from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hrasskis]]. They were distinguished by large, veined air sacs on their backs; they were represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] by the belligerent [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Cian Marook]].

Hrasskis society believed strongly in the succession by seniority, with the highest social value being waiting one's turn.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
